Anchor.description: Named interaction point local to its owning object.
Anchor.title: Anchor

AttachmentDefinition.description: A visual layer owned by one bone, either rigid or weighted mesh.
AttachmentDefinition.title: AttachmentDefinition

CharacterBlueprint.description: Primary LLM output for character generation (specs §12).
CharacterBlueprint.title: CharacterBlueprint

CharacterGenerationRequest.description: AI character generation request (Ollama planner -> deterministic builder).
CharacterGenerationRequest.title: CharacterGenerationRequest

ContactDefinition.description:
An intentional contact with one hard reference side (specs §15.3).

The reference side defines the contact point for the hold interval; the
follower side is solved toward it. Never make both sides hard.
ContactDefinition.title: ContactDefinition

HandshakeAction.description: Two-actor handshake owned by the initiating actor (plan.md §9.4).
HandshakeAction.title: HandshakeAction

Job.description: Public, serializable snapshot of a job.
Job.title: Job

MeshAttachmentSpec.description: A deformable attachment skinned by weighted bone influences.
MeshAttachmentSpec.title: MeshAttachmentSpec

MotionPlanApplyPatchRequest.description: Deterministically apply a previously generated and previewed patch.
MotionPlanApplyPatchRequest.title: MotionPlanApplyPatchRequest

MotionPlanGenerationRequest.description: AI motion planning request (Ollama planner -> deterministic compiler).
MotionPlanGenerationRequest.title: MotionPlanGenerationRequest

MotionPlanPatch.description: A correction against stable action ids, never a new unrelated plan.
MotionPlanPatch.title: MotionPlanPatch

MotionPlanPatchRequest.description: Ask the model for a scoped correction patch (plan.md §8.6).
MotionPlanPatchRequest.title: MotionPlanPatchRequest

PatchSetParameters.description: Update editable scalar parameters of one existing action.
PatchSetParameters.title: PatchSetParameters

PlanWarning.description: Model- or validator-reported uncertainty attached to the plan.
PlanWarning.title: PlanWarning

target_ref.description: Anchor reference with a sit affordance.
target_ref.title: Target Ref

SyncConstraint.description: Cross-lane timing constraint on two or more actions (plan.md §9.1).
SyncConstraint.title: SyncConstraint

TransformSpec.description: Serialized TRS transform, local to its parent. Y-up, CCW degrees.
TransformSpec.title: TransformSpec

ValidationIssue.description: One invariant violation, addressable by code and document path.
ValidationIssue.title: ValidationIssue

schema.title: Response List Character Builder Presets Api V1 Characters Builder Presets Get

patch.description: Persist a user edit of the plan (parameters, ordering, style).

post.description:
Deterministically apply a previewed patch. Undo by re-saving the
returned ``previous_plan`` through PATCH /motion-plans/{plan_id}.
Start a deterministic compile job for a stored plan (202 + job).
Ask the model for a scoped correction patch; returns a preview job.

schema.title: Response List Projects Api V1 Projects Get

post.description: Import a portable archive uploaded as a raw ``application/zip`` body.

schema.title: Response List Project Characters Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Characters Get

post.description: Start an AI character-generation job (specs §23.2, returns 202 + a job).

get.description: Download the project as a portable, checksummed archive.

schema.title: Response List Project Revisions Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Revisions Get
Response List Project Scenes Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Scenes Get

post.description: Start an AI motion-planning job (specs §23.5, returns 202 + a job).
